name: The Barn
content: The best vegetarian burger patties I have ever had. One of the beautiful things about veggie patties is that there is no single correct way to create a veggie patty, meaning every restaurant adds their own creativity and style into the patties that you don’t really get with traditional meat patties I have Opinions on restaurants that serve Impossible Burger patties, and they are not good. Also Impossible Burger gives me indigestion.. I wish more places made their own veggie patties.
